Our Solar Products

Comprehensive range of solar energy solutions for all your needs

Product Categories

☀️

Solar Panels

High-efficiency monocrystalline and polycrystalline solar panels

250W - 550W per panel

25-year performance warranty

High efficiency (20-22%)

Weather-resistant design

Tier-1 manufacturer quality

🏠

Solar Rooftop Systems

Complete rooftop solar solutions for residential and commercial

1KW - 1MW+

On-grid, Off-grid, Hybrid options

Net metering compatible

Customized system design

Professional installation

🔥

Solar Water Heater

Eco-friendly solar water heating systems

100L - 500L

Save 70% on water heating costs

Works in all weather conditions

Low maintenance

5-7 year payback period

💧

Solar Pump

Solar-powered water pumps for agriculture and irrigation

0.5HP - 10HP

No electricity required

Ideal for remote locations

Long lifespan

Government subsidy available

🔋

Inverters & Batteries

High-quality inverters and battery storage solutions

1KW - 100KW

Pure sine wave inverters

Lithium-ion batteries

Smart monitoring systems

Backup power during outages

⚙️

EPC Services

End-to-end Engineering, Procurement, and Construction

Any scale

Complete project management

Quality assurance

Timely project delivery

Post-installation support

System Types

On-Grid System

Connected to the utility grid. Excess power is sold back to the grid.

Net metering

No battery required

Maximum savings

Grid backup

Off-Grid System

Independent system with battery storage. Perfect for remote locations.

Complete independence

Battery backup

No grid required

Reliable power

Hybrid System

Combines grid connection with battery storage for maximum flexibility.

Best of both worlds

Grid + battery backup

Optimal savings

Smart switching

☀️ Solar Energy

Powering your future with clean, renewable solar energy. Save up to 80% on electricity bills while contributing to a sustainable planet.
